title: Simplify ByteMeal: Keep 3 core forms, NGO status actions, remove Dashboard/stats

requirements.summary: Remove Dashboard page route and all navigation links to it
acceptanceCriteria: No navigation link for Dashboard exists in the navbar.
The /dashboard route is removed from App.tsx.
Navigating to /dashboard shows a 404 or redirects to home.

file_operations.description: Remove the /dashboard route definition from the TanStack Router configuration. Remove the route import for the Dashboard page component.
Remove the Dashboard navigation link from both desktop and mobile navigation menus.

requirements.summary: Remove Food Listings page route and navigation link
acceptanceCriteria: No navigation link for Food Listings exists in the navbar.
The /listings route is removed from App.tsx.

file_operations.description: Remove the /listings route definition from the TanStack Router configuration. Remove the route import for the FoodListings page component.
Remove the Food Listings navigation link from both desktop and mobile navigation menus.

requirements.summary: Remove Admin NGO Approval page route and navigation link
acceptanceCriteria: No 'Admin: NGOs' link appears in the navigation bar.
The /admin/ngo-approval route is removed from App.tsx.

file_operations.description: Remove the /admin/ngo-approval route definition from the TanStack Router configuration. Remove the route import for the AdminNGOApproval page component.
Remove the 'Admin: NGOs' navigation link from both desktop and mobile navigation menus.

requirements.summary: Update Navigation to show only: Home, Donate, Get Help, Volunteer, NGO Register
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation shows exactly: Home, Donate, Get Help, Volunteer, NGO Register.
No other links (Dashboard, Food Listings, Admin) appear in the nav.

file_operations.description: Update the navigation links array to contain exactly five links: Home (to /), Donate (to /donate), Get Help (to /request-help), Volunteer (to /volunteer), and NGO Register (to /ngo-register). Remove all other links including Dashboard, Food Listings, and Admin: NGOs. Update both desktop navigation menu and mobile hamburger menu to reflect these five links only.

requirements.summary: Add Accept and Mark as Collected action buttons to donation cards with status badges
acceptanceCriteria: Each donation card shows an 'Accept' button when status is 'Available'.
Clicking 'Accept' updates the donation status to 'Accepted' in the backend and reflects on the UI.
Each 'Accepted' donation card shows a 'Mark as Collected' button.
Clicking 'Mark as Collected' updates the donation status to 'Collected' in the backend and reflects on the UI.
Status badge on each card updates to reflect current state: Available (green), Accepted (sky-blue), Collected (gray).
Toast notification is shown on successful status update (e.g., 'Donation marked as Accepted').
Backend exposes an updateDonationStatus function that accepts a donation ID and new status string.

file_operations.description: Transform each donation card to display a status badge showing the current DonationStatus (available in green, accepted in sky-blue, collected in gray). Add an 'Accept' button to cards with status 'available' that calls the acceptDonation backend function. Add a 'Mark as Collected' button to cards with status 'accepted' that calls the markDonationAsCollected backend function. Wire both buttons to use React Query mutations with optimistic updates and invalidate the donations query on success. Show toast notifications on successful status updates or errors. Use the backend interface methods acceptDonation(donationId) and markDonationAsCollected(donationId) which already exist in the backend.

Add two new mutation hooks: useAcceptDonation and useMarkDonationAsCollected. Each mutation should call the respective backend function (acceptDonation or markDonationAsCollected) using the actor from useActor hook, invalidate the 'donations' query key on success, and handle errors gracefully. Update the DonationStatus type if needed to match the backend interface enum (available, accepted, collected).

requirements.summary: Re-expose Food Listings page as /listings for NGOs to manage donations
acceptanceCriteria: NGOs can access a page listing donations with Accept/Collected action buttons.
The page is reachable via a navigation link.

file_operations.description: Re-add the /listings route definition to the TanStack Router configuration, pointing to the FoodListings page component. This reverses the removal in REQ-30 to enable NGOs to access donation management.
Add a 'Food Listings' or 'Manage Donations' navigation link pointing to /listings in both desktop and mobile navigation menus. Position it after 'Get Help' and before 'Volunteer' for logical flow.

requirements.summary: Remove Dashboard and stats counters from Home page, keep only Donate and Get Help CTAs
acceptanceCriteria: Home page shows only 'Donate Food' and 'Get Help' as primary CTA buttons.
No live stats counters (donation count, volunteer count, request count) are displayed on the Home page.
No links or buttons pointing to Dashboard or Food Listings appear on Home.

file_operations.description: Remove the platform stats section that displays live counters for donations, volunteers, and requests. Remove any CTA buttons or links pointing to Dashboard or Food Listings. Keep only the 'Donate Food' button (linking to /donate) and 'Get Help' button (linking to /request-help) in the hero section. Preserve the hero section with its glassmorphism design, ByteMeal branding, and the features section highlighting key capabilities. Remove any useGetDonations, useGetVolunteers, or similar query hooks that fetch stats data.
